title: Fleet ingest cleanup: old flat WAI files dumped into seed/ingest/ during migration — systemic pattern across all spokes
signal: During spoke migration, the old pre-WAI-Spoke flat structure (WAI-Events.json, WAI-Guide.md, WAI-State.md, WAI-Lugs.jsonl, scripts, etc.) was copied wholesale into WAI-Spoke/seed/ingest/ instead of being retired. Also: seed/processed/ was used as a pipeline path before seed/ingest/processed/ was canonical, causing a split. Fixed across 17 spokes this session.
rationale: Init migration script needs a guard: only teaching files belong in seed/ingest/. All other old WAI files must be retired to trash_bin at migration time.
